
# Reto 
### b00tl3gRSA3
## Descripcion
Why use p and q when I can use more?Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 52129.
## Solucion
```
c = 

n = 

  

e = 65537

  

# obtenido de https://www.alpertron.com.ar/ECM.HTM

tn = 

  

d = pow(e, -1, tn)

m = pow(c, d, n)

  

flag = bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

  

print(flag)

picoCTF{too_many_fact0rs_3023548}
```
